decks.name: Lego Explosive Media
decks.rendering_engine_prefix: Graphic Novel / Flat Cel Animation style.
decks.master_prompt_template: A LEGO minifigure tarot card . LEGO brick textures visible throughout. Yellow LEGO hands and faces. Bold flat primary colours with sharp black ink outlines. Explosive Media satirical graphic novel art style — anti-war political cartoon aesthetic, American military-industrial complex satire. High contrast. Comic book panel composition. Irreverent and subversive tone.
decks.technical_suffix: High fidelity, professionally colour graded, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

decks.name: Thoth Tarot
decks.rendering_engine_prefix: Projective Geometry / Watercolor and Airbrush rendering.
decks.master_prompt_template: A tarot card in the authentic Thoth Tarot style of Lady Frieda Harris. Mixed-media painting (oil, acrylic, and possibly colored pencil on textured paper), technique reflecting Stained-glass effect, linear and geometric fragmentation, faceted planes. The image is a masterpiece of occult symbolism composed of geometric forms and radiant lines. An intricate painting using translucent watercolour and smooth airbrush techniques — luminous overlapping layers creating depth through transparency and shifting light. Surrealist and highly intellectual. Projective geometry governs the composition: sharp intersecting lines of light, radiating power centres, complex mathematical structures, dense matrix of sacred geometry, interlocking circles, and multi-dimensional planes folding into one another. Flashing colours — highly saturated contrasting hues creating a shimmering energetic effect.Sharp precise lines, esoteric glyphs, cosmic power.
decks.technical_suffix: High-resolution, fine art texture, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

decks.name: Claymation Thoth
decks.master_prompt_template: A macro photograph of a handcrafted claymation relief carving tarot card. The central figure is sculpted in colourful polymer clay. High-detail handcrafted claymation relief carving — textures show subtle thumbprints, tool marks, and a matte porous finish typical of polymer clay or terracotta. Macro-style lighting with soft shadows highlighting the 3D depth and tactile quality of raised figures and recessed grooves. Background is a dense mosaic of geometric patterns and celestial spheres in the style of Frieda Harris: sacred geometry, interlocking circles, overlapping triangles, stylised Egyptian and Hebrew esoteric symbols. Rich palette of deep blues, golds, and burnt oranges.Bas-relief depth.
decks.technical_suffix: Sharp focus on clay textures, tool marks, and 3D depth. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
